name: The Tower Lower Office and Calaboose
description: The ground-floor interior of the tower, divided between a white oak desk and filing area for the Night Marshal's municipal duties and the iron-barred jail cell occupying the rear third of the space.
atmosphericDetails: The scent of new white oak and wet mortar mingles with the faint mineral smell of the rising water in the bore — a combination that belongs to no other place on earth.
The iron cell bars cast long parallel shadows across the flagstone floor when the desk lamp is lit.
The strongbox beneath the desk is closed but not locked — its hasp is bent slightly, as if it was opened in a hurry and the lock was not properly re-engaged.
